items.title: After Dell, TSMC CEO Issues Stark Warning On AI Capacity Constraints For 'Very Long Time,' Hints At Potential Price Hike— 'We Still Need To...'
items.body:
The CEO of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (NYSE:TSM), C.C. Wei, issued a warning over manufacturing capacity constraints and signaled openness to future price hikes. During the Thursday pre-market trading session, the stock fell 2.08%. 



Wei’s comments were made during TSMC’s annual shareholders’ meeting in Hsinchu, Taiwan, on Thursday, Reuters reported. Despi
